notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin grounds into a double play, catcher Luis Campusano to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Caleb Durbin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Story GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Roman Anthony out at 2nd. Trevor Story out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Johnson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Johnson strikes out on a foul tip.
